events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: A true icon of music, Sir Paul McCartney is 84 today! From The Beatles to Wings and beyond, what's your favourite Macca track?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her distinctive voice has soundtracked decades. What's your favourite?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy-winning artist Lionel Richie, famous for his soulful ballads and upbeat hits, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, is it his birthday?
angles.copy: All night long we'll be celebrating Lionel Richie's 77th birthday! What's your go-to Lionel track?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic American singer Cyndi Lauper, known for her unique style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 today.

angles.name: Girls Just Want to Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Her music and style are truly timeless. What's your favourite Cyndi hit?

events.title: Remembering George Michael, would have been 63
events.blurb: Today would have marked the 63rd birthday of the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who passed away in 2016.

angles.name: George Michael's enduring legacy
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael today, who would have been 63. His music continues to inspire and move us. What's your most cherished George Michael song?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: It's 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Remembered
angles.copy: 17 years since we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture is still felt worldwide. What's his greatest track for you?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, an influential figure in music history, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love, Ringo!
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From Abbey Road to his All-Starr Band, what's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, astrophysicist, and animal welfare advocate Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incomparable Brian May! His guitar riffs are legendary. What's your all-time favourite Queen solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Got the Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy of The Rolling Stones frontman is unmatched. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: The irony of MTV's first video
angles.copy: Remember when MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'? The irony wasn't lost on us. What was your favourite music video from the early days?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, propelling the Manchester band to stardom.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your album highlight?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love, and Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. What's your favourite performance from the iconic festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His legacy lives on. What's your essential Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the tragic anniversary of the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Impact
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. His powerful lyrics and undeniable talent left an indelible mark on music. What's his most impactful song for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: It's the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on September 2, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix today. His innovative guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Across the Abbey Road
angles.copy: On this day, The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. Which track from the album always gets a listen from you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the influential frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! Her fierce talent and distinctive voice continue to rock. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: British singer and former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid Liam Gallagher is 54 today! The voice of a generation, still going strong. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or Oasis?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released on October 1, 1971, as part of his album of the same name.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates deeply today. What does this iconic track mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: On October 23, 2001, Apple introduced the first iPod, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 songs in your pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we carried our music. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the film franchise.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate 007 theme tune? Let us know!
